mapper.select: SELECT E.EMP_NO AS empNo, E.EMP_NM AS empNm, E.DEPT_CD AS deptCd, D.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, E.POS_CD AS posCd, P.POS_NM AS posNm, E.EMP_EMAIL AS empEmail, E.HP_NO AS hpNo, E.ZIP_CD AS zipCd, E.ADDR1 AS addr1, E.ADDR2 AS addr2 FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON D.DEPT_CD = E.DEPT_CD AND D.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST P ON P.POS_CD = E.POS_CD WHERE E.EMP_NO = #{empNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE EMP SET EMP_EMAIL = #{empEmail}, HP_NO = #{hpNo}, ZIP_CD = #{zipCd}, ADDR1 = #{addr1}, ADDR2 = #{addr2}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo}
UPDATE EMP SET PWD = #{pwd}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo}
UPDATE EMP_FILE SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND FILE_TYPE_CD = 'PROFILE'
